project.title: Geographic Ranking Analytics
project.description: Given a business location and a keyword, produces a heatmap of how that business ranks on local search across a grid of nearby points.

flow.title: Scan & Score Flow
flow.description: A scan request is split into a grid of geographic points; each point is scored against the keyword; ranks are aggregated into a heatmap, stored and returned.

domains.name: Identity & Tokens
domains.description: Users, white-label tenants and the token economy that gates scan usage.

domains.name: Scan Pipeline
domains.description: Distributes work, calls the search provider and scores results per grid point.

domains.name: Analytics & History
domains.description: Aggregates results into a heatmap and keeps history for trend analysis.

steps.title: Scan Request
steps.description: User submits a business + keyword + scan size. The request is bound to their account.

steps.title: Token Gate
steps.description: Decrements the user's token balance based on the scan's grid size before any expensive work runs.

steps.title: Grid Builder
steps.description: Turns the business location + scan size into a grid of latitude/longitude points to test.

steps.title: Scoring Worker
steps.description: For each grid point, asks the search provider where the target business ranks for the keyword. Runs in parallel across the grid.

steps.title: Search Provider
steps.description: Third-party local search API. The worker calls it once per grid point.

steps.title: Rank Aggregator
steps.description: Computes the average rank, relevance buckets and total ranks across the whole grid.

steps.title: Heatmap Store
steps.description: Persists the latest heatmap and its metadata so the UI can render it.

steps.title: History Store
steps.description: Keeps prior scans for the same business so the UI can show month-over-month trend.

steps.title: Heatmap Response
steps.description: Returns the rendered heatmap, summary metrics and a link to past scans.
